column1: #   entity_id  stable key you choose (team:x / player:x convention)
#   aliases    pipe-separated extra spellings (canonical is always matched)
#   ambiguous  1 = tag collides with an English word -> matched CASE-SENSITIVELY
#              by case at all -- leave them OUT of text aliases and let the
#              id-resolved link layer (hltv_id) carry them. That asymmetry is
#   hltv_id    optional numeric id -> enables unambiguous /player/<id>/ or
